arg1.name: midi_map_handle
arg1.name_reason: First unsigned int arg in all MidiMap functions is the midi_map_handle passed to build_midi_map.

arg2.name: cc_no
arg2.name_reason: Second arg identifies the CC number being forwarded, consistent with map_midi_cc naming.

arg3.name: channel
arg3.name_reason: Third int arg is the MIDI channel, consistent across all MidiMap forward/map functions.

arg4.name: value
arg4.name_reason: Fourth int arg is the CC value being forwarded.

arg4.name: value
arg4.name_reason: Fourth int arg is the note velocity value being forwarded.
